title: orobanche cruenta var. ulicis
intro: Orobanche cruenta var. ulicis, also known as the Broom Broomrape or Broom-loving Broomrape, is a parasitic plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and its potential to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Orobanche cruenta var. ulicis include its use in treating urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Orobanche cruenta var. ulicis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
